goal: Use Loop to repair the DEV-015 verifier lint failure in the existing DEV-015 worktree without changing the business scope. The known failure is npm run lint: apps/api/src/index.ts has an unused parameter named reason. Repair only what is needed, keep DEV-015 approval closure behavior intact, update DEV-015/AUDIT-015 if verification status changes, and rerun gates.
acceptance: Repair is executed through the codex_executor connector in the existing DEV-015 isolated worktree, not by manual chat edits.
The repair is limited to the known lint failure unless verification exposes a directly related regression.

DEV-015 approval behavior remains intact: human approval instances, nodes, current approver, approve/reject/return/transfer/add-sign actions, source writeback, workbench integration, permissions, and audit records.
AI remains unable to approve, reject, return, transfer, add-sign, become an approver, sign, pay, or confirm execution.
Frontend remains inside the existing Approval top-level menu and keeps the single 1440 desktop workspace target.
Run and pass git diff --check, npm run lint, npm run typecheck, npm run test, npm run build, npm run smoke:api, and npm audit --audit-level=low.
If any gate fails, classify the failure, repair up to Loop retry limits, or write intent debt/repair queue if unresolved.
